{{Quote|Get lost, tenderfoot. I hunt desert wraid, I don't babysit.|Dorak, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Dorak Quinn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] hunter whom [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] met in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. In [[3956 BBY]], he was one of the newer hunters on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Dorak was, at first, rude to Revan when he met him in [[Fazza Utral|Fazza's]] [[Hunting Lodge]]. Quinn later developed respect for the reformed [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] upon learning that Revan, along with fellow hunter [[Komad Fortuna]], had killed a [[Krayt dragon/Legends|Krayt dragon]] in the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]].
